name: Platinum Card
perks: 5x Membership Rewards on flights booked directly with airlines or via Amex Travel (up to $500,000 per year)
5x on prepaid hotels booked via Amex Travel
$200 airline fee credit per year for incidental fees on one selected airline
$200 Uber Cash annually ($15/month Jan-Nov, $35 in Dec)
$240 digital entertainment credit ($20/month) - Disney+, Hulu, ESPN+, NYT, Peacock, and more
$100 Saks Fifth Avenue credit annually ($50 semi-annual)
Access to Centurion Lounges, Delta Sky Club (with Delta flights), and Priority Pass Select
Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee credit
Fine Hotels + Resorts benefits (room upgrades, late checkout, credits)
Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite and Hilton Honors Gold status
drawbacks: $695 annual fee requires actively using credits to justify cost
Only 1x points on most everyday spending
Many credits are use-it-or-lose-it and require enrollment
Centurion Lounge access limited during peak hours
